interaction_phrase: In collaboration with Harvard and MIT
occurrence_sentence: In collaboration with Harvard and MIT, QuEra demonstrated logical-level magic-state distillation entirely within the logical qubit layer on Gemini, building error-protected logical qubits using distance-3 and distance-5 color codes and a 5-to-1 distillation protocol.

interaction_phrase: In collaboration with Harvard and MIT
occurrence_sentence: In collaboration with Harvard and MIT, QuEra demonstrated logical-level magic-state distillation entirely within the logical qubit layer on Gemini, building error-protected logical qubits using distance-3 and distance-5 color codes and a 5-to-1 distillation protocol.

interaction_phrase: A spin-off of the European Center for Quantum Sciences
occurrence_sentence: QPerfect A spin-off of the European Center for Quantum Sciences in Strasbourg, pioneers high-performance quantum computing emulation, enhancing quantum computer performance to unlock large-scale, industry-relevant applications.
